author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: Fix 8 unsafe .data() calls on potentially-GPU tensors. (1) transcendental.rs: exp/sin/cos/clamp forward paths call .data() on GPU output when constructing grad node storage — add .cpu()? before .data(). (2) indexing.rs: IndexSelectBackward and MaskedIndexBackward backward + their forward functions need GPU guard. Audit already confirmed autograd engine, shape ops, linalg, arithmetic, activation, and reduction backward paths are all safe.
